decisions.label: DEFAULT_WS belongs to the CLI runner, not transport
decisions.rationale: Keep DEFAULT_WS in run-remote-cua.mjs as CLI/default configuration; transport receives URL via constructor.

decisions.label: AppServerClient is not pure transport — it bakes in Codex thread policy
decisions.rationale: Keep transport.mjs naming for architecture consistency, but add a header comment documenting retained Codex app-server thread policy.

decisions.label: Validation set never opens a WebSocket — AppServerClient move is unverified end-to-end
decisions.rationale: Add a mocked AppServerClient request-shape self-test and still note that live WebSocket validation is deferred to the next run-mode execution.
